intro: Oncostema tingitanum, also known as Oncostema, is a perennial herb belonging to the Zygophyllaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Oncostema include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Oncostema include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to support wound healing, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
